DISCOVERY 302, NOTICE OF PACIFIC TRACK TIME INCS MOTION TO HAVE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED, WITH NO OPPOSITION, PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PER CRC 391. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $555 ARE AWARDED, SANCTIONS TO BE PAID WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF ORDER. ORDE SIGNED. (JPT/302)

DISCOVERY 302, NOTICE OF PACIFIC TRACK TIME INC MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS WRITTEN DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED, WITH NO OPPOSITION, PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PER CRC 391. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF JEFF JOHNSTON IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE, WITHOUT OBJECTION VERIFIED FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO, AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO WITHIN 14 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $555.00 ARE AWARDED TO PTT AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF, WHO IS ORDERED TO PAY, SUCH SANCTIONS WITHIN 2 WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. (JPT/302)

Notice Of Pacific Track Time Inc Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Written Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

James E. Burns, Esq., of Kornenberg Law, (510) 254 6768, appearing for Defendat and moving party Pacific Track Time.

RULING: DEFENDANT PACIFIC TRACK TIME, INC'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Written Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions is heard this day. There being no opposition filed nor an objection the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling. The unopposed Motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff Jeff Johnston is ordered to provide, without objection verified full and complete responses to Form Interrogatories, Set Two, and Special Interrogatories, set Two within 14 days from Notice of this Order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $555.00 are awarded to PTT and against Plaintiff, who is ordered to pay, such sanctions within 2 weeks of Notice of this Order. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter C. Catalanotti; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (JPT/302)
